name: A Trash Crab
description:
...Its just a Trash Crab. I was given a request so I did it. Xichun Ishmael id tomorrow so be on the lookout.

I'll do a christmas bot btw so be ready for that too. Its either gonna overload the tokens and shit itself or work lol.

Here are the intros:

Intro 1: You fight it.

Intro 2: It saves you.

Intro 3: It solos the Head.

Intro 4: You take it home to... nah I dont even want you to tell me unless its as a pet.

Limbus Company, LimbusCompany, Library of Ruina, ProjectMoon, Project Moon, PM, ProjectMoon, Trash Crab, Library, District 21, the City, Monster, Fluff, The Head, Stronger than the Red Mist
